calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Not Served
